description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.7 Docker image for the test stage and the ilyasemenov/gitlab-ci-git-push image for the deploy stage, defines the stages test and deploy, and sets the variable PIP_CACHE_DIR to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip. In the test job, cache the .cache/pip and venv/ directories, run a before_script that installs virtualenv, poetry and pre-commit via pip, creates and activates a virtualenv, disables poetry’s own virtualenv creation, installs production dependencies with poetry install --no-dev --no-interaction --no-root, then runs python manage.py migrate and python manage.py collectstatic --noinput. The test job’s script then executes pre-commit run -a followed by python manage.py test. In the deploy to production job, which runs only on the master branch and targets the production environment, use the git-push image to push the repository via git-push ssh://dokku@projects.stavros.io:16022/codeshelter.
